title: [kimi-review] 1a81b18: [SEVERITY: low] Timestamp precision changed from 6 to 9 frac
description:
Commit: 1a81b185b
Message: fix(schc): improve _abs_window for retransmit/reorder

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] Timestamp precision changed from 6 to 9 fractional digits (`...30.000000000Z` vs prior `...35.809257Z`). If the beads tooling parses these timestamps expecting microseconds, the nanosecond format may cause parse issues elsewhere.
